summary: Iteration 7 regression: ₹$ double-symbol bug is FIXED across Dashboard, Invoices, Expenses, and Reports. Logged in as admin, navigated to all four pages, and scanned full visible body text. Every monetary value renders as ₹NNN.NN with zero '$' characters and zero '₹$' occurrences on all pages.
passed: Login as admin@businessflow.io succeeds and lands on /app dashboard
/app dashboard: 0 '$' chars, 0 '₹$' doubles; KPIs & recent orders render as ₹11,432.78 / ₹4,692.78 / ₹6,740 etc.
/app/invoices: 0 '$' chars, 0 '₹$' doubles; subtotal/tax/total cells render as ₹1000.00 / ₹173.00 / ₹1173.00 etc.
/app/expenses: 0 '$' chars, 0 '₹$' doubles; amount cells render as ₹6740.00 / ₹120.00 / ₹3600.00 etc.
